bead.title: install/init: `ddx install --global` and `ddx init --global` write global tree and agent-tier links
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a)
The install-to-agent (machine-wide) surface must let an operator install a plugin once per machine so its skills are available across every project. `ddx install <name> --global` writes the plugin under `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/` and links it into the home agent-tier skill paths (`~/.claude/skills/<name>`, `~/.agents/skills/<name>`). `ddx init --global` is the umbrella first-time-setup command: install the bundled default ddx plugin globally, create the agent-tier links, and write the global config.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/cmd/install.go:184 `resolveInstallDirs(global)` returns the global install root plus `~/.agents/skills` and `~/.claude/skills` when global==true (install.go:191-192) and routes through `installLocal` (install.go:358) which writes skills into each harness surface (install.go:489-507).
- cli/cmd/init.go:318 `initGlobal()` installs the bundled default plugin into `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx` (init.go:320) and cli/cmd/init.go:362 `writeGlobalConfig` writes `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/config.yaml`; init.go:73 `runInit` branches to global mode at init.go:74.
- These paths need locked-in tests proving the global tree and home-level agent links are produced.

PROPOSED FIX
- Ensure `ddx install <name> --global --silent` writes plugin content to `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/` and creates a symlink (or copy on OSes without symlink support) under `~/.claude/skills/<name>` and `~/.agents/skills/<name>` whose target resolves into the global plugin tree.
- Ensure `ddx init --global` installs the default `ddx` plugin globally, creates the agent-tier links for it, and writes `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/config.yaml`.
- Tests use `t.Setenv("XDG_DATA_HOME", ...)` and `t.Setenv("HOME", ...)` (and/or a fake home dir) so home-level writes are sandboxed.

NON-SCOPE
- Project-tier install behavior and `ddx init` (no flag) — sibling bead.
- `ddx update --global` — sibling bead.
- Removing the per-project install (both modes coexist).
- Migrating legacy ~/.config/ddx paths.
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex.

DEPS
- ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution) for `ddxroot.GlobalDir()`.
- Sibling resolver bead (ResolvePlugin precedence) — global installs must be discoverable as the "global" layer.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTreeAndLinksAgentTier (cli/cmd/install_test.go): `ddx install <name> --global --silent` writes the plugin under `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/` and creates a symlink-or-copy under `~/.claude/skills/<name>` and `~/.agents/skills/<name>` resolving into the global plugin tree.
2. TestInitGlobal_CreatesAgentTierLinks (cli/cmd/init_test.go): after `ddx init --global`, `~/.claude/skills/ddx` and `~/.agents/skills/ddx` point into `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx/`, and `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/config.yaml` exists.
3. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
